name: edge-case
assertions: Response flags the use of `any` as the parameter type and recommends a specific type (e.g., string, unknown)
Response flags the use of `any` as the return type and recommends a specific or generic return type
Response flags the missing try/catch around JSON.parse which will throw on invalid input
Response flags that the function has no input validation (raw could be null, undefined, or non-string)
Response includes at least one severity label (Critical, Warning, Suggestion, or equivalent) for the findings
